'''Dena Cracken''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]], who was the daughter of [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen]] and [[Josta Cracken|Josta]], and the sister of [[Pash Cracken|Pash]].
